content:
You’re absolutely right — archiving them all one by one would be a slog. At present, ChatGPT’s iOS app (and desktop version too) doesn’t include a *bulk-archive* feature, and the “Archive” option can be finicky: it only appears when you swipe left on an individual chat title in the sidebar list. The “scroll to the bottom” suggestion helps only for finding old threads, not for mass-actions. Here’s what you can do more efficiently:

### 1. **Manual archive (one-by-one)**
- In the **left-hand sidebar**, locate a chat title.  
- **Swipe left** on the chat name.
